question: What text is displayed directly above the name 'NEIL GAIMAN' on the screen? A. MEET YOUR NEW INSTRUCTOR B. WORLD-RENOWNED WRITER C. MASTERCLASS D. NEIL GAIMAN
How many words are in the phrase 'MEET YOUR NEW INSTRUCTOR' shown on the title card?
What color is the blazer worn by the instructor? A. White B. Brown C. Black D. Green
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A man with curly dark hair and a salt-and-pepper beard wears a black blazer over a black t-shirt. He sits in front of wooden bookshelves filled with various books while speaking and gesturing with his hands in front of his chest. A white MasterClass logo is visible in the bottom right corner of the screen.

question: Which of the previously seen entities is back on screen? A. person in silhouette against a bright window B. man with curly hair and a beard wearing a black blazer C. man writing in a notebook with a fountain pen D. white text listing book titles on a black background

Did the video display BOTH the phrase 'MEET YOUR NEW INSTRUCTOR' AND the name 'NEIL GAIMAN'? A. Only the phrase 'MEET YOUR NEW INSTRUCTOR' B. Only the name 'NEIL GAIMAN' C. Both the phrase 'MEET YOUR NEW INSTRUCTOR' and the name 'NEIL GAIMAN' D. Neither the phrase nor the name
Where is the white 'MASTERCLASS' logo visible throughout the video? A. in the background B. above the name C. in the bottom right corner D. on the right side
Where are the wooden bookshelves located relative to the man with curly dark hair? A. in the background B. in the bottom right corner C. above the name D. on the right side
What action is the man with the curly dark hair performing in front of the wooden bookshelves? A. Sitting B. Writing C. Speaking D. Reading
Describe the sequence of visual transitions and text overlays shown during the introduction of the instructor.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a man with a beard speaks in front of bookshelves; at 2s, a title card reading 'MEET YOUR NEW INSTRUCTOR' appears; at 4s, the video returns to the man gesturing with his hands; at 12s, text identifying him as 'NEIL GAIMAN' overlays the screen; at 18s, the scene shifts to a silhouette standing by a bright window.

question: Is the list of published book titles displayed on the screen yet?

How has the on-screen text content changed from the opening title card to the segment listing the instructor's works? A. It changed from the instructor's name to a list of book titles B. It changed from a greeting message to a list of book titles C. It changed from a list of book titles to a greeting message D. It changed from a greeting message to the instructor's name
The text identifies him as a writer; which specific book titles appear on screen next?
canonical_answer: The screen lists Stardust, Coraline, The Sandman, American Gods, The Graveyard Book, and Neverwhere.

question: What visual scene occurs IMMEDIATELY before the man is shown writing in a notebook? A. Man speaking in front of bookshelves B. Person standing in silhouette by a window C. Title card reading 'MEET YOUR NEW INSTRUCTOR' D. Text overlay 'WORLD-RENOWNED WRITER'
What is the title of the comic book shown on the wooden table? A. The Sandman B. Watchmen C. Unable to answer D. Coraline
What specific sentence did the man write in the notebook while in the forest? A. Unable to answer B. Once upon a time C. The end D. Chapter One

Given what is visible so far, could the person holding the comic page turn it to reveal the artwork underneath? A. No — no hands are visible to grasp the page B. Yes — hands are holding the page edge and the page is being flipped C. No — the page is glued flat to the table surface D. No — no second page is attached to turn to
